subject: Gaming
title: Unity's Runtime Fee Disaster
description: A quick win: understand Unity's Runtime Fee Disaster.

hook.text: Unity announced a per-install fee for games. Indie developers panicked. The decision was reversed in days.

buildup.text: In September 2023, Unity announced it would charge developers a fee every time their game was installed.

discovery.text: Indie developers calculated they'd owe more in fees than they earned in revenue. The math was devastating.

twist.text: The CEO who proposed the policy had secretly sold Unity stock before the announcement. Trust evaporated.

climax.text: Unity reversed the policy and the CEO resigned. Godot engine adoption surged as developers sought alternatives.

punchline.text: Announced. Panicked. Reversed. A CEO fired. Trust destroyed in days.

quiz.question: What happened after Unity announced its runtime fee?
options: Developers revolted, the policy was reversed, and the CEO resigned
